failedAssertions.reason: Assertion requires focused accounting services under 500 lines; current branch still has oversized services (AccountingCoreEngine 6212 LOC, AccountingFacade 2160 LOC, AccountingPeriodService 1006 LOC, ReconciliationService 683 LOC, AccountingAuditTrailService 526 LOC).
Bank and subledger reconciliation evidence passes, but inter-company reconciliation coverage/implementation evidence is absent in current ReconciliationService and test surface.

Shared ValidationUtils exists, but broad adoption is incomplete: module code has no observed ValidationUtils.parseEnum/validateDateRange usage and still relies on inline enum/date-range validation paths.

appliedUpdates.description: Added accounting-core flow guidance note documenting instability of PurchasingServiceTest#createPurchase_journalPostedFirst (NPE in setup) and stable alternate evidence tests for facade validation.
